moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship, golf's oldest major, begins its tournament days this week at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England.

angles.name: Main Event Kick-off
angles.copy: Golf's biggest names are gathering! The Open Championship officially kicks off its tournament rounds at Royal Birkdale on Thursday. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug? #TheOpen

angles.name: Practice Days Buzz
angles.copy: The pros are on the course! Practice days are in full swing at Royal Birkdale ahead of The Open Championship. Any early standouts you've spotted?

moments.title: The Hundred Season Begins
moments.blurb: The sixth season of The Hundred, the UK's 100-ball cricket tournament, launches on July 21st, with teams like Welsh Fire ready for action.

angles.name: Tournament Launch
angles.copy: Get ready for 100 balls of pure cricket action! The Hundred returns on July 21st. Which team are you backing this season?

angles.name: Welsh Fire Focus
angles.copy: Our very own Welsh Fire are gearing up for The Hundred season, which starts July 21st! Will they light up Sophia Gardens this year? #WelshFire

moments.title: Glasgow Prepares for Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: Glasgow is counting down to the 2026 Commonwealth Games, with the King's Baton Relay currently touring Scotland ahead of the July 23rd opening ceremony.

angles.name: Baton Relay Excitement
angles.copy: The King's Baton Relay is making its way across Scotland, building excitement for the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games, starting July 23rd! What event are you most looking forward to?

angles.name: Glasgow Hosting
angles.copy: Glasgow is getting ready to host the Commonwealth Games again, kicking off on July 23rd at the OVO Hydro! Scotland will be buzzing with sporting action. #Glasgow2026

moments.title: England Men vs India Men ODI
moments.blurb: England's men's cricket team will face India in a One Day International at Lord's on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Big Match Build-up
angles.copy: A huge cricketing clash this Sunday! England Men take on India in an ODI at Lord's. Who's going to win this rivalry? #ENGvIND

angles.name: Lord's Hosting
angles.copy: Lord's is set for a massive game this Sunday as England Men face India in a highly anticipated One Day International. Will you be there? #LordsCricket

moments.title: Latitude Festival Approaching
moments.blurb: The 20th edition of Latitude Festival, featuring headliners like David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi, takes place from July 23-26 in Suffolk.

angles.name: Festival Countdown
angles.copy: Counting down the days to Latitude Festival! Henham Park is getting ready for David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi and more from July 23-26. Who are you most excited to see? #LatitudeFestival

angles.name: Diverse Lineup
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here, bringing its unique blend of music, comedy, and arts to Suffolk from July 23-26. A truly unmissable summer experience! #FestivalSeason

moments.title: New ITV Drama 'The Dark' Premieres
moments.blurb: The new gripping serial killer drama 'The Dark', set in the Scottish countryside, premieres tonight, July 12th, on ITV.

angles.name: Tonight's TV Buzz
angles.copy: New serial killer drama 'The Dark' premieres tonight on ITV! Get ready for a gripping story set in the Scottish wilderness. Will you be tuning in? #TheDark

angles.name: Scottish Setting
angles.copy: The stunning Scottish countryside takes centre stage in ITV's new drama 'The Dark', which kicks off tonight. Perfect Sunday night viewing! #ScottishTV

moments.title: Anya Taylor-Joy in 'Lucky' on Apple TV+
moments.blurb: Anya Taylor-Joy stars in the new drama 'Lucky', based on Marissa Stapley's novel, premiering July 15th on Apple TV+.

angles.name: Streaming Soon
angles.copy: Anya Taylor-Joy is back! Catch her in the new Apple TV+ drama 'Lucky', a gripping tale of a reformed criminal, streaming from July 15th. #LuckyTV

angles.name: Must-Watch Drama
angles.copy: Looking for your next binge? 'Lucky', starring Anya Taylor-Joy, looks like a thrilling ride. It drops on Apple TV+ this Wednesday! #NewDrama

moments.title: UK Heatwave Continues This Week
moments.blurb: A prolonged spell of hot weather is affecting the UK, with temperatures expected to reach mid-30s across England and Wales, and potentially 36°C by Friday.

angles.name: Stay Cool Alert
angles.copy: Another week of sunshine and high temperatures across the UK! Remember to stay hydrated and seek shade as the heatwave continues. #UKWeather

angles.name: South West Heat
angles.copy: Devon, prepare for more heat! Temperatures could hit 34°C in the South West by Saturday. Stay safe in the sun this week! #DevonWeather

angles.name: London Temps
angles.copy: London's heatwave continues, with temperatures expected to stay in the high 20s/low 30s this week. Keep cool and look out for thunderstorms later in the week! #LondonHeat

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin for UK Schools
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are set to begin for many children across the UK this week, with breaks starting around July 20-23.

angles.name: Kids Break Up
angles.copy: The countdown is on! School's out for summer for many kids across the UK this week. What are your plans for the long break? #SummerHolidays

angles.name: Welsh Schools Out
angles.copy: It's nearly time for the summer holidays in Wales! Many schools break up around July 20-23. Wishing all students a fantastic summer! #WalesSummer

moments.title: Happy Birthday Luke Hemmings!
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, frontman of 5 Seconds of Summer and a successful solo artist, turns 29 on July 16th.

angles.name: 5SOS Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 29th Birthday to Luke Hemmings from 5 Seconds of Summer! What's your favourite 5SOS track? #LukeHemmings

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stewart Copeland!
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer for The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Police Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Sending Happy 74th Birthday wishes to the iconic Stewart Copeland of The Police! What's your favourite drum beat from the legend? #StewartCopeland

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ed Kowalczyk!
moments.blurb: Ed Kowalczyk, the powerful lead singer of the rock band Live, turns 55 on July 16th.

angles.name: Live Frontman's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to Ed Kowalczyk, the incredible voice of Live! What's your go-to Live anthem? #EdKowalczyk

moments.title: Happy Birthday Richard Marx!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Richard Marx, known for hits like 'Right Here Waiting', celebrates his 63rd birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Soft Rock Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 63rd Birthday to the one and only Richard Marx! What's your favourite power ballad from him? #RichardMarx

moments.title: Happy Birthday Wizkid!
moments.blurb: Nigerian superstar Wizkid (Ayodeji Ibrahim Balogun), a global icon in Afrobeats and pop, turns 35 on July 16th.

angles.name: Afrobeats Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Big Happy 35th Birthday to the incredible Wizkid! What's your favourite track from the Afrobeats sensation? #Wizkid

moments.title: Happy Birthday Luke Bryan!
moments.blurb: Award-winning American country music superstar Luke Bryan celebrates his 49th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Country Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Let's wish a very Happy 49th Birthday to country music sensation Luke Bryan! What's your favourite song to sing along to? #LukeBryan

moments.title: Happy Birthday Tom Fletcher!
moments.blurb: Tom Fletcher, the beloved singer-songwriter from McFly and best-selling author, turns 41 on July 17th.

angles.name: McFly Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 41st Birthday to the multi-talented Tom Fletcher! From McFly hits to children's books, he's done it all. What's your favourite McFly song? #TomFletcher

moments.title: Happy Birthday Geezer Butler!
moments.blurb: Terence 'Geezer' Butler, the legendary bassist and lyricist for heavy metal pioneers Black Sabbath, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Metal Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 77th Birthday to the iconic Geezer Butler of Black Sabbath! What's your favourite Sabbath riff? #GeezerButler

moments.title: Happy Birthday Regina Belle!
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning R&B singer Regina Belle, known for hits like 'A Whole New World', turns 63 on July 17th.

angles.name: R&B Diva's Birthday
angles.copy: Sending Happy 63rd Birthday wishes to the soulful Regina Belle! What's your favourite track from this incredible vocalist? #ReginaBelle

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jason Aalon Butler!
moments.blurb: Jason Aalon Butler, the dynamic frontman of Fever 333 and former letlive., celebrates his 40th birthday on July 17th.

angles.name: Alternative Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 40th Birthday to the energetic Jason Aalon Butler! His work with letlive. and Fever 333 is unforgettable. What's your favourite track? #JasonAalonButler
